title: Sino-Russian trade has hit record, approaching $200 bln — Xi Jinping
description: "I note with satisfaction that the governments, ministries and agencies, as well as the Chinese and Russian regions, are working hard on the implementation of a...
snippet: BEIJING, October 18. /TASS/. Bilateral trade between China and Russia has reached record all-time high, approaching $200 bln, the Chinese leader Xi Jinping said...
